name: aigovops-library-core
description: AiGovOps Library — the governed core. One container that runs anywhere; the center of truth that convenes wherever invited.
comment: v1 is intentionally dependency-free: it uses only Node's built-in http + crypto (Ed25519). No supply chain to audit, no keys in any client. Swap the simplified canonicalizer in src/core/beacon.js for a real RFC 8785 JCS library before production.
